problem: Couples and individuals struggling with infertility need accessible, effective, and affordable fertility treatment, but face high costs, uncertain outcomes, and emotional stress throughout the treatment journey.
solution: National fertility clinic network offering comprehensive fertility services including IVF, IUI, egg freezing, donor programs, and LGBTQ+ family building. Pioneered shared-risk refund programs for IVF treatment. Part of US Fertility network, providing relationship-based care with local expertise and national resources.
